label: http api • stop sequence actually stops generation before the stop text
query: Count upward from 1, one number per line: 1, 2, 3 and so on. Do not stop on your own.
notes: Behavioral contract, not shape: with stop set to '7' the returned content must NOT contain the stop text and finish_reason must be 'stop' — a server that ignores stop and runs to max_tokens fails both assertions. The counting prompt makes reaching the stop token near-certain. Off-CI (needs a model).
